logs.message: EMS.API depends on Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens (>= 8.3.2) but Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens 8.3.2 was not found. Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens 8.4.0 was resolved instead.
